programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: Te Ao with Moana
programme.desc: A weekly current affairs show that examines New Zealand and international stories through a Maori lens.

programme.title: FBC News
programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: euronews
programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: CBC The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: BBC 6 O'Clock News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Ring
programme.desc: The Ring is Euronews' weekly political debate. In each episode, two political representatives from across the EU propose a diversity of opinions and conversations around the most important issues of EU affairs and the wider European political life.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz review Hook, My Own Private Idaho, Turtle Beach. Plus interviews, including Gus Van Sant and Joan Chen, and a set visit to The Nostradamus Kid.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton review My Girl, Final Analysis, Fried Green Tomatoes at the Whistle Stop Cafe. Plus interviews, including Anna Chlumsky and Alan Parker.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As the participants finally get into a rhythm, loneliness begins to settle in for the survivalists. One seemingly small choice proves to be a disastrous mistake for one participant, while another has an encounter with a viscous predator.

programme.title: UFOs: Investigating the Unknown
programme.desc: Project Blue Book is launched to study the UFO problem.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: The rising cost of living is the number one concern for the majority of Australian households. Others maintain there's no crisis and that we should reign in our spending when times are tough. How will these attitudes affect the way we vote on election day?

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: While investigating a potentially ancient marker stone on Oak Island, the team makes stunning new discoveries.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Join host Jimmy Carr. Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the classic words and numbers quiz.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: America's most dangerous black prison gang lurks in the shadows until they seize a Maryland prison, unleashing chaos and violence.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: The Yakuza's shadowy world is exposed, where sharp-suited gangsters move money, settle scores, and serve rivals' fingers on a platter.

programme.title: UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: All over the world, there are giant monoliths that our ancient ancestors carved out of solid rock. But what was the purpose of these huge stone monuments? Did they serve some kind of ritual function? Were they intended to honor the gods? Or is it possible that, as some believe, certain monoliths were actually designed to conduct energy?

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: A caravan with some precious cargo goes missing and the gang are tasked with getting it back.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: A giant bunny, a crocodile and a golf buggy chase, Cardi goes on a mission that'll truly test his mettle.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 2000s
programme.desc: Stern will stop at nothing to shock his loyal listeners, laughing in the face of common decency and the FCC. When rivals Q and A challenge his popularity, war breaks out.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 2000s
programme.desc: Radio king Howard Stern continues to draw attention with his on-air antics. And when Opie and Anthony resurface, their hatred for Howard isn't enough to save the toxic friendship.

programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton review Homicide, Stop, or My Mom Will Shoot, Suburban Commando, The People Under the Stairs, Europa, Europa. Plus press conference and a Paul Cox feature.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz review Grand Canyon, Beethoven, Memoirs of an Invisible Man, Meeting Venus. Plus interviews, movie news & listings.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton review Harley Davidson and the Marlboro Man, In the Shadow of the Stars, Taxi Blues, Aunt Julia and the Scriptwriter. Plus interview with Lloyd Kaufman.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: Calipari: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: With tournaments on the horizon and draft decisions looming, the team pushes through their final games of the regular season.

programme.title: Calipari: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: Amidst unprecedented competition, the SEC Tournament stands as the ultimate test for Calipari's Arkansas team.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Slow TV is back, celebrating stunning landscapes of Countries across Australia. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of Country.

programme.title: Where Are You Really From?
programme.desc: Michael meets with the Assyrians of Fairfield, a people without a nation that have made a new homeland in the suburbs of Western Sydney.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Inside the Huddle
programme.desc: What is it like to be a footballer? Candid conversations, laughs, and insights that go beyond the game and into the outer.

programme.title: Over the Black Dot
programme.desc: In 2026, Over the Black Dot becomes a digital-first Rugby League yarn free-flowing conversations on footy, culture and community, with panellists and guests sharing authentic Indigenous stories.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Join host Jimmy Carr for season fourteen of 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown. Sean Lock and Rosie Jones take on Jon Richardson and Harry Hill the classic words and numbers quiz.

programme.title: Casualties of War
programme.desc: War is war. But murder is murder. An unforgettably haunting story of Vietnam... and its victims.

programme.title: Sex Before the Internet
programme.desc: Sex Before the Internet explores the world before porn was at your fingertips 24/7. It was a time when X-rated magazines, VHS tapes, and 1-900 lines let people get in touch with what touched them. Explore the most iconic strip clubs, brothels, and porn that defined the era before the world of sex was just a click away on your phone. Revisit the iconic rebels who pushed the limits and sometimes went too far.

programme.title: Homeland
programme.desc: Tensions rise and truths are revealed in this explosive series finale.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: A legendary gang sees the rise of two brothers set on domination at any cost. Together, they set Chicago's streets ablaze.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.
